criteria.name: Type hints on all public functions
criteria.check: All public function signatures include type annotations

criteria.name: pytest tests present
criteria.check: Test file uses pytest (not unittest) with descriptive test names

criteria.name: Ruff-compatible code
criteria.prompt: Would this code pass ruff linting with default rules? Check for common issues: unused imports, bare excepts, mutable default args. Answer yes/no.
